testCases.name: D1
testCases.input: Did Dr. Faraz treat a dog named Max?
testCases.actualOutput:
Yes – Dr. Faraz has treated Max on several occasions. Here are a few excerpts:

| Date & Time | Chat | Sender | Message |
|-------------|------|--------|---------|
| 3 PM, 3/28/2026 | TEST_Vetlog Clinical Group | Dr. Faraz | “Max’s Kidney function came back: positive for parasites. Treatment started.” |
| 8 AM, 4/3/2026 | TEST_Vetlog Clinical Group | Dr. Faraz | “Follow‑up for Max: Much better.” |
| 6 PM, 4/7/2026 | TEST_Vetlog Clinical Group | Dr. Faraz | “Max discharged. Recovering well.” |

These messages confirm that Dr. Faraz has indeed treated the dog named Max.
testCases.expectedOutput: SELECT * FROM raw_messages WHERE sender LIKE '%Faraz%' AND text LIKE '%Max%' AND chat_name LIKE 'TEST_%'

metadata.agent_sql: SELECT id, chat_name, sender, text, timestamp FROM raw_messages WHERE sender LIKE '%Faraz%' AND text LIKE '%Max%' AND chat_name LIKE 'TEST_%'

testCases.name: D2

Here’s what Nurse Ali recorded as having given Coco:

|-------------|-------------------|------|
| 5 PM, 4/17/2026 | **Carprofen** – 1 tablet | “Administered Carprofen to Coco.” |
| 8:23 AM, 4/18/2026 | **Carprofen** – 7 ml | “Administered Carprofen to Coco (Parrot).” |
| 9:26 PM, 4/21/2026 | **Omeprazole** – 3 tablets | “Administered Omeprazole to Coco.” |
| 8:59 PM, 5/18/2026 | **Praziquantel** – 3 tablets | “Administered Praziquantel to Coco.” |
| 5:00 PM, 6/20/2026 | **Flea treatment** – dosage not specified | “Flea treatment administered.” |

These are the only entries in the chat where Nurse Ali explicitly logged administering medication to Coco.
testCases.expectedOutput: SELECT * FROM raw_messages WHERE sender LIKE '%Nurse Ali%' AND text LIKE '%Coco%' AND chat_name LIKE 'TEST_%'

metricsData.reason: Hallucination — data exists but agent said nothing found

metadata.agent_sql: SELECT id, sender, text, timestamp FROM raw_messages WHERE chat_name LIKE 'TEST_%' AND text LIKE '%Nurse Ali%' AND text LIKE '%Coco%'

testCases.name: S2
testCases.input: Did anyone treat a German Shepherd named Rocky?
testCases.actualOutput:
Yes – several staff members have treated Rocky the German Shepherd.  
Here are a few key messages from the group chat:

| Sender | Date & Time | Message snippet |
|--------|-------------|-----------------|
| **Dr. Faraz** | 1:25 AM 3/28/2026 | “Rocky (Dog (German Shepherd)) diagnosed with Kennel Cough. Prescribed Ranitidine.” |
| **Nurse Ali** | 10:18 PM 3/30/2026 | “Emergency case: Rocky (Dog (German Shepherd)) — Parvo. Stabilized with Doxycycline.” |
| **Admin Desk** | 11:33 AM 4/3/2026 | “Administered Meloxicam to Rocky (Dog (German Shepherd)). Dosage: 1 tab(s).” |
| **Receptionist Sara** | 6:42 PM 4/4/2026 | “Rocky (Dog (German Shepherd)) discharged. Owner: Fatima Ali. Status: Needs monitoring.” |
| **Dr. Sarah Jenkins** | 11:26 AM 4/15/2026 | “Blood work done for Rocky (Dog (German Shepherd)). Report: low RBC count.” |

These entries confirm that Rocky has received diagnosis, medication, emergency care, and follow‑up from multiple clinic staff.
testCases.expectedOutput: SELECT * FROM raw_messages WHERE (text LIKE '%Rocky%' OR text LIKE '%German Shepherd%' OR text LIKE '%GSD%') AND chat_name LIKE 'TEST_%'

metricsData.reason: Hallucination — data exists but agent said nothing found
